steps.title: Keep subject and verb together
steps.content: The complete subject is Calida Garcia Rawles, and the main verb is was. Standard English does not place punctuation between a subject and its immediately following verb.

steps.title: Reject interrupting marks
steps.content: A inserts an unnecessary dash. B inserts a colon where no explanation or list follows an independent clause. C inserts a comma between the subject and verb. The answer is D.
